cards.back: The process of converting plaintext into unreadable ciphertext to protect data from unauthorized access
The unauthorized access, use, disclosure, disruption, modification, or destruction of sensitive data
The process of creating, distributing, and managing cryptographic keys to ensure secure data transmission
The process of controlling and managing user access to data and systems to prevent unauthorized access
